description: A reusable visual style guide for premium corporate infographics inspired by Intel brand thinking: clean engineering precision, blue-led trust, subtle technology cues, calm whitespace, and glass-like modern data visualization.

brand_thinking.visual_principle: Make data feel reliable, structured, and quietly advanced. Avoid decorative excess; use clarity, hierarchy, and subtle blue accents to communicate technical credibility.
avoid: too many labels inside the chart

background.texture: very subtle paper grain or soft matte surface
background.corner_radius: large, 24-40px if used as a card

chart_style.type: donut chart preferred over pie chart

highlight.style: small blue glow nodes at segment boundaries

recommended_structure.top_left: small Intel logo or Intel-style wordmark area
recommended_structure.top_right: small uppercase section title with blue square marker
recommended_structure.main_right: vertical legend with icon, label, percentage, count
recommended_structure.bottom: short update note or data source line

iconography.avoid: filled cartoon icons or colorful clipart

glow.placement: segment joints or small accent dash only

prompt_template.image_generation_prompt: Create a premium Intel-inspired corporate data visualization infographic. Use a clean blue-gray technology palette, frosted glass donut chart, subtle Intel-blue glow accents, large whitespace, precise engineering layout, and minimalist thin-line icons. Layout: small Intel-style branding area top-left, uppercase section title top-right, large donut chart on the left, structured legend on the right with category label, percentage, and case count. Background is soft light gray-blue gradient with very subtle grain. Typography is modern, clean, enterprise-grade, similar to Intel Clear / SF Pro / Inter. Avoid playful colors, heavy 3D, thick outlines, or clutter.
prompt_template.negative_prompt: no rainbow colors, no Excel default chart look, no thick borders, no cartoon icons, no busy background, no heavy shadows, no messy labels, no low-end PowerPoint style
